title: microsorum longissimum
intro: Microsorum longissimum, also known as the "Water Fern" or "Water Clover", is a type of aquatic fern native to Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Microsorum longissimum include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating various infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
